title: D&D 2024 Background
description: Schema for files in data/backgrounds/. Each background grants an ability score increase (total 3 across two or three abilities), an Origin feat, two skill proficiencies, one tool proficiency, and one of two starting equipment packages. Phase 9 (D1-1) canonicalized every mechanical grant onto the ``effects`` array — flat top-level fields ``feat``, ``skill_proficiencies``, and ``tool_proficiencies`` are no longer recognized. The origin feat is encoded as ``{type: grant_origin_feat, feat: "<feat name>"}``, skill proficiencies as ``{type: grant_skill_proficiency, skills: [...]}``, and tool proficiencies as ``{type: grant_tool_proficiency, tools: [...]}``. ``ability_score_increase`` and ``starting_equipment`` remain structural metadata for the wizard. Phase 10 (D6-5) will add strict count/existence constraints on top of this canonical surface.

total.description: D6-5: Backgrounds must grant exactly 3 ability score points total (2024 rules).

effects.description: All mechanical grants from the background (origin feat, skill proficiencies, tool proficiencies, etc.). Each entry must conform to the shared effect schema. Phase 9 (D1-1) canonicalized the entire background mechanical surface onto this array — flat top-level fields like ``feat``, ``skill_proficiencies``, and ``tool_proficiencies`` are no longer recognized.
